mapper.select:
SELECT o.outbound_id AS outboundId, o.work_order_no AS workOrderNo, o.work_order_date AS workOrderDate, o.due_date AS dueDate, o.outbound_date AS outboundDate, o.status AS status, o.handled_by AS handledBy,
m.material_name AS materialName, s.supplier_name AS supplierName, i.required_qty AS requiredQty, i.stock_qty AS stockQty, CASE WHEN i.stock_qty >= i.required_qty THEN '정상' ELSE CONCAT('부족 (재고 ', i.stock_qty, ')') END AS stockStatus,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY o.outbound_id ORDER BY i.material_id) AS rowNum
FROM material_outbound o LEFT JOIN material_outbound_item i ON o.outbound_id = i.outbound_id LEFT JOIN material m ON i.material_id = m.material_id LEFT JOIN supplier_item si ON m.material_id = si.material_id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON si.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
AND ( o.outbound_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND DATE(o.outbound_date) >= #{startDate}
AND DATE(o.outbound_date) <= #{endDate}
AND o.status = #{status}
ORDER BY o.outbound_date ASC
ORDER BY o.outbound_date DESC
ORDER BY o.status ASC
ORDER BY o.status DESC
ORDER BY o.due_date ASC
ORDER BY o.due_date DESC
ORDER BY o.outbound_date DESC
LIMIT #{perPageNum} OFFSET #{pageStart}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM material_outbound o
o.handled_by LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT o.outbound_id AS outboundId, o.outbound_date AS outboundDate, o.handled_by AS handledBy, o.status AS status, o.work_order_no AS workOrderNo, o.work_order_date AS workOrderDate, o.due_date AS dueDate, o.note AS note, m.material_name AS materialName
FROM material_outbound o LEFT JOIN work_order wo ON o.work_order_no = wo.order_id LEFT JOIN material_outbound_item i ON o.outbound_id = i.outbound_id LEFT JOIN material m ON i.material_id = m.material_id
WHERE o.outbound_id = #{outboundId} LIMIT 1

SELECT i.material_id AS materialId, m.material_name AS materialName, i.required_qty AS requiredQty, i.stock_qty AS stockQty, CASE WHEN i.stock_qty >= i.required_qty THEN '정상' ELSE '부족' END AS stockStatus FROM material_outbound_item i LEFT JOIN material m ON i.material_id = m.material_id WHERE i.outbound_id = #{outboundId}
mapper.update: UPDATE material_outbound SET status = '출고완료', outbound_date = NOW() WHERE outbound_id = #{outboundId}
